title: The Road to Keynote
description: Become the surprise keynote speaker before the conference ends.

objectives.description: Earn speaker credentials and deliver the keynote

title: Lost and Found
description: Someone found your badge. Track it down.

objectives.description: Ask the Registration Manager about your badge
Retrieve your badge from the grabber machine in Expo Hall

title: Demo Day Rescue
description: A vendor's demo is broken and they're panicking. Help them save face.

objectives.description: Visit Vendor Row and talk to the Vendor Rep
Get the deployment USB from Zane in Coffee Bar or Server Room
Return the USB and fix the demo

title: Mystery of the Missing Slides
description: The keynote slides vanished. Find out what happened.

objectives.description: Ask the Conference Organizer about the missing slides
Locate the VIP courier and recover the presentation data

title: VIP Access
description: You need the Speaker Pass and a VIP invite to access the private keynote suite.

objectives.description: Earn the Speaker Pass from the conference organizer
Reach the Rooftop Lounge VIP event

title: The Main Event
description: You're ready. Deliver the keynote and blow everyone away.

title: Headhunted
description: A startup founder is impressed with your problem-solving skills.

objectives.description: Talk to the Startup Founder at Vendor Row
Complete at least two quests before accepting their offer

title: The Accidental Sysadmin
description: Reboot the conference server in the Server Room. Or don't.

objectives.description: Investigate the server rack in the Server Room
